Family.title: Family
Family.description: Represents a secure family unit within the FinNest AI ecosystem, sharing financial data and goals.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Family entity.

familyName.description: A user-friendly name for the family (e.g., 'The Smith Family').

familyCode.description: A unique, short code generated for members to use when joining the family.

createdByUserId.description: Reference to the User ID (from Firebase Auth) of the parent who initially created this family.

members.description: A denormalized map of userId to their role and join status.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the family record was created.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Global user profile for quick discovery of family membership.

params.name: familyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the family.

definition.description: Global user directory for finding family membership.
